title: Krista's Better Doors
description: A vanilla-friendly door & trapdoor fix for creative building
body:
This pack provides vanilla-friendly fixes for doors and trapdoors aimed at creative building. It is designed to be used with the Terra1912 pack (available from our Discord).

### Features
- Fixes the invisible part between the upper and lower part of doors
- Hingeless doors and handle adjustments
- Removes trapdoor handles
- Other minor texture tweaks

---
### Links
- [WBC Builds Discord](https://discord.gg/cmcVH3GVu9)
